nasb.text: Of Zebulun, there were 50,000 who went out in the army, who could draw up in battle formation with all kinds of weapons of war and helped David with an undivided heart.

esv.text: Of Zebulun 50,000 seasoned troops, equipped for battle with all the weapons of war, to help David with singleness of purpose.

cnv.text: 西布倫支派的子孫中，能出去作戰、可以使用各種兵器，行軍整齊、不生二心的，共有五萬人。

ccb.text: 来自西布伦支派、能征善战、拥有各种兵器、训练有素、忠心耿耿的五万人；
